'''''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 1''' is the first volume in the Return of the Jedi manga series. It was illustrated by Shin-Ichi Hiromoto and was based upon the original story by George Lucas. It was adapted from the screenplay by George Lucas and Lawrence Kasdan.

[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] deliver a mesage and a "gift" to the imfamous kingpin of crime, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. Afterwards, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] begin their attempt to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] who's frozen in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]]. Jabba feeds Luke to the [[Rancor/Legends|Rancor]], but the Jedi kills the beast and Jabba orders them to be fed to the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]]. However, Luke has other plans.
